description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house is surrounded by a fenced yard with a well-maintained green lawn, a large leafy tree, and outdoor furniture including a round table with chairs and a small decorative structure. The fencing is simple and uniform, enclosing the yard on all sides. The building's facade is primarily dark with contrasting white window frames and interior walls. The overall setting suggests a private, urban residential property with a focus on outdoor living and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a tree and outdoor furniture. The design is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open space and natural light.
description_view_0: This view shows the house's side with large windows and a clear view of the fenced yard, tree, and some interior rooms.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the front yard with the tree dominating the left side, visible outdoor furniture, and the main windowed facade.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the house's solid wall is prominent, with the yard, tree, and fence clearly visible, as well as the outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side of the house, showing more of the flat roof, the tree behind the house, and the window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a large glass door, no visible steps or porch, and minimal decorative elements
